Error FOT_ATR018 TDT activation for country/region & is different in production.

entry.title: Migration concept change
entry.content:
Hello Community,
I would like to ask SAP's opinion on the fact that the client changes the migration strategy in the last minute. They went live on 02/06/2025. The original plan was to migrate open items and balances for 31/05/2025, but they changed this in the last minute back to 31/12/2024. They would put all the transactional data from January to May 2025 when they have time (manual or standard sap upload applications). My question: what is the official viewpoint from SAP's side on this? We foresee risks on executing the migration in June 2025 for December 2024.
Thanks, Orsolya

entry.title: can we add new action button to standard FIORI application in public cloud by using IN_APP Extensib?
entry.content: can we add new action button to standard FIORI application in public cloud by using IN_APP Extensibility or any other way please suggest.

entry.title: sap public cloud BADI needed for VF02 release to accounting
entry.content:
Hi Guys, 

I looking for BAdi's for VF01 or VF02 during Acc document creation or release to accounting in SAP public cloud platform .

I tried the following BAdi but these are not triggering

FCI_BADI_INVOICING~FKK_EVENT_2612

ES_SD_BIL_EXTEND~SD_BIL_APM_SET_APP_REASON

FCI_BADI_BILLINGREQUEST~FKK_EVENT_8300

FKK_BADI_SD~FKK_EVENT_4040

the goal is to add the billing document details into a custom table when they proceed to create accounting document number.

please share your input as i am struck with this for almost 3 days.

entry.title: Inconsistencies Between Quality and Production Environments in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

We’re encountering critical inconsistencies between the Quality and Production environments in our SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud system, particularly affecting payment processes. These discrepancies are impacting our client’s daily operations, and we would appreciate your insights:

  1. Payment Advice Output Issue:
    Despite correctly configuring the Output Parameter Determination (OPD) for payment advice forms, the Automatic Payment Program in Production continues to trigger and send an outdated form that is not included in the OPD settings. The new form, which is correctly configured and active in OPD, is being ignored. This issue does not occur in the Quality environment.

  2. Payment File Format Discrepancy:
    In CBC, each payment method is assigned a specific Payment Medium Format under “Set Up Payment Methods for Each Country/Region.” However, in Production, the Manage Payment Media app generates payment files using a single, incorrect format across all methods, ignoring the CBC configuration.

Has anyone experienced similar issues or can offer guidance on:

  • Why OPD settings might be bypassed in Production?
  • How to ensure CBC payment method configurations are correctly reflected in Production?

Any help in diagnosing and resolving these inconsistencies would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: HU Label not printed for HUs loaded as initial stock balances via Migration Cockpit
entry.content:
We are in the process of implementing Greenfield public cloud warehousing. We are testing the initial stock balance upload with HUs using Migration Cockpit.

Issue- HUs are created and the stock loaded using Migration Cockpit, but no labels are printed on creation. We have Output Parameter Determination configured to print the HU Label on creation. However, the HU label prints fine when we create the HU in the Inbound delivery.

As part of the cutover, we need to print the HU label and stick it on every pallet (approximately 10,000). This is a showstopper for go-live. 

I tried printing from Warehouse Monitor but have click send record for every HU, means have to click 10,000 times

entry.title: Unable to post 0,01€ entry on VAT G/L Account
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts, 

We are currently uploading journal entries via the "Upload General Journal Entries" application (App ID: F2548), and we are encountering an issue related to the posting of €0.01 amounts to VAT G/L accounts.

These small amounts represent rounding differences generated by external interfaces and need to be cleared in SAP.

Here is the error log detail:

Tax entry not possible in this item
Message no. FF724

Diagnosis
You can not enter a tax amount in this item since, due to the posting amount entered and the tax code, a total tax amount of zero has been calculated.

This could either be due to the fact that the tax code has been defined with a value of 0%, or because the posting amount entered (that is, the tax base) is too small.

Example:

With a tax rate of 15%, a tax amount greater than zero will only be achieved with a base amount greater than 0.04. With values of 0.03 and less, it is therefore not possible to enter a tax amount.

Procedure
Only enter tax amounts in conjunction with tax codes for which a percentage rate not equal to zero has been defined. Make sure that in documents with several G/L account items you enter the total tax amount in an item with a sufficiently high posting amount.

Can you please advise on a workaround for this issue ? 

Thank you for your help. 

Best regards,

entry.title: How to update fields in the Additional Information section using import template in Manage Workforce
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support, 

 

We need to update certain fields in the Additional information section of Personal information in the Manage Workforce app. However, using the Worker template, we are not able to update fields like Middle Name and Initials in the Additional Information section. How can we update the Additional information section fields using import template. 

 

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Configuring SAP Start Step by Step
entry.content:
Dear All

We want to access the SAP Public Cloud System through SAP Mobile Start and having SAP Build Work Zone Standard Edition , after manual configuration , required Apps are still not showing. Please suggest , what is missing or any step by step guide. 

Following activities have been performed.

  1. SAP Public Cloud system is registered within System Landscape of BTP Global Account.
  2. Within SAP Public Cloud scenario - SAP_COM_0647 is also configured to outbound (https://api.cf.eu10-004.hana.ondemand.com:443/)
  3. Formation having SAP Build Work Zone and Public Cloud System
  4. SAP Build Work Zone Site is available , however no content is showing.

entry.title: Situation Handling in EAM
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working in the Public Cloud environment and would like to know if it is possible—and how—to utilize Situation Handling for a scenario where, whenever a maintenance request is created with the processing context set to "Emergency," certain people are notified immediately via email.

Thank you in advance for any help you can provide.

entry.title: Query Regarding Cost Visibility in Actual Cost Report – SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi

We are currently operating on SAP Public Cloud, where the production order is triggered from the revenue project, utilizing Q type stock.

We have processed GRNs for certain components against the purchase order linked to the production order within this project. In this context, I would appreciate clarification on whether these costs should be visible in the actual cost report for the project.

Additionally, could you confirm the GL against which these costs would be reflected—whether it aligns with the GL planned for cost allocation or the GL designated for budget planning?

Furthermore, I would like to understand the report’s contents upon the closure, confirmation, and settlement of the production order.

Looking forward to your insights.

entry.title: How to restrict Keyboard shortcuts using screen persona script in SAP public cloud ?
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Is there a way to restrict certain keyboard shortcuts using screen personas, as it is overriding my current script logic and saving the screen thereby generating goods movement document. Otherwise, is it possible to restrict them in ABAP environment by adding a custom logic

I want to restrict Control + Save and Fn + F3. I am able to record session for these in CO11N Transaction as below:

session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey(11);


session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey(3);

How to restrict or suppress this action?  Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: #CoE#GDTD导出软件集合导出软件时;提示导出失败
entry.content:
我创建了一个399类型的类，

然后通过app‘分类/配置CDS视图’生成了399类型的CDS视图，

我尝试修改并且新增这个CDS视图类下的特征，

再去生成CDS1，结果发现CDS1没有改变，

猜测可能是399类型的类只能新增不能修改，于是我新建了一个399类，然后创建了新的399CDS2。399类型CDS1作为了数据源创建了外部API类型的CDS将销售报价单中的详细特征传输出SAP，所以我尝试用CDS2替换CDS1，在导出软件时，出现报错，如图

entry.title: SAP public cloud uses EML to batch split the items of delivery orders
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I want to use EML in SAP Public Cloud to split the batch of delivery order line items. Can anyone help me?

 

 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Filed" scrap "in routing masterdata does not exist in the Import template
entry.content: Filed" scrap "in routing masterdata does not exist in the Import template,so how should I migrate the data?There is no way to update the data after migration, so could you please tell me a good way to do this?

entry.title: SAP
entry.content: how to change the country postal code set in the sap public edition

entry.title: Add Custom Fields in S/4HANA Public Cloud Migration Cockpit Template for Product Master
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,


We are in the final stages of our S/4HANA Public Cloud go-live and are using the Migration Cockpit (Migrate Your Data App) for product master data migration.


We need to include the following custom fields in the Product master - Source Data template as they are critical for our operations and data integrity:




  2. Document




  4. Basic Data Text




  6. Document Version




  8. Inspection Text




  10. Internal Comment



These fields are PERSON_NAME from a business perspective and essential for completing the product data upload before go-live.


Kindly guide us on the recommended approach:




  • How to enhance the migration template in S/4HANA Public Cloud?




  • Can we use the "Custom Migration Object" app or key user extensibility to achieve this?




  • If not feasible directly, what is the SAP-recommended alternative for loading these fields?



Please treat this as Go-Live Critical and advise urgently.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to add other depreciation areas to migrated assets and delete data for migrated assets
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support, 

If I want to add value data to other depreciation areas for assets migrated using the "Migration Cockpit" app, is it possible to do so?
(Please tell me if there is a way other than using the "Post Transfer Values ​​- For Legacy Asset" app.) 
If possible, please tell me how to add data. 

 

Also, is it possible to delete data for many assets that have been migrated at once? (Please answer using a method other than using the Reset Transaction Data job template from the app Schedule Accounting Data Corrections.)
If possible, please tell me how to delete data.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Withholding tax code issue
entry.content:
When posting an invoice using FB60 in SAP, specifically related to Withholding Tax (WHT). after posting, the "Tax Code" field in the document is shows only the Tax Type instead of the tax code filed

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Purchasing tax for Canada import
entry.content:
Hello, 

we did set all the taxes for Canada's jurisdictions, but we were not able to find the place, where to set rule for imports from USA as non taxable. 

We have two plants in Ontario and Quebec, so we have set two tax code plus one as Tax exempt. As taxes are set according to ship to address, we always see Ontario or Quebec taxation. 

Any idea, how to set Tax exempt for all orders coming from US Supplier?

We have S4HC public

Thank you

Lucie
